description: Style-ETF ratio trend/thrust regime detector (factor momentum): QQQ/SPY, IWM/SPY, RSP/SPY, SPHB/SPLV, VUG/VTV, MTUM, QUAL, USMV, ARKK, SMH/QQQ, XBI. THRUST = ratio bottomed below 50dMA then crossed up = factor altseason signal. Complementary to justhodl-factor-returns (cross-sectional L/S factor P&L from stocks); this measures tradeable style-ETF rotation regimes.
